categories.name: DPA Parties And Processing Scope
categories.definition: Obligations to identify the contracting parties and describe the basic processing arrangement in the data processing agreement. This includes party identity and contact details, duration, nature and purpose, data types, and categories of data subjects.

categories.name: Security Of Processing
categories.definition: Obligations concerning technical and organisational safeguards, security risk assessment, confidentiality controls, and measures to protect personal data against accidental or unlawful loss, destruction, disclosure, alteration, or access. This category also covers security-related assistance obligations.

categories.name: Personal Data Breach Management
categories.definition: Obligations relating to breach detection, notification, documentation, content of breach notices, and communication of breaches to supervisory authorities or data subjects. This category also includes assistance with breach notification and communication.

categories.name: Data Protection Impact Assessment
categories.definition: Obligations to conduct, support, document, review, or consult on a data protection impact assessment, including its required contents and related stakeholder input. This category covers DPIA preparation, advice, and follow-up review.

categories.name: Sub-Processor Authorization And Oversight
categories.definition: Obligations governing the engagement, change, objection, and contractual flow-down of sub-processors. This category also includes liability and authorization rules tied specifically to sub-processor use.

categories.name: Processing Instructions And Legal Basis
categories.definition: Obligations requiring the processor to act only on documented controller instructions, to handle situations where law requires processing without instructions, and to notify the controller of unlawful instructions or legal constraints. This category also covers instruction compliance by persons acting under the processor's authority.

categories.name: Confidentiality Of Personnel
categories.definition: Obligations to ensure that persons authorized to process personal data are bound by confidentiality commitments or statutory confidentiality duties. This category is limited to personnel confidentiality requirements.

categories.name: Assistance With Data Subject And Regulatory Rights
categories.definition: Obligations requiring the processor to assist the controller with data subject rights requests, supervisory authority consultation, and other regulatory interactions that are not themselves breach or security measures. This category covers support functions tied to compliance administration.

categories.name: Data Return Deletion And Post-Termination Handling
categories.definition: Obligations governing what happens to personal data when processing services end, including return, deletion, and related post-service handling. This category is limited to end-of-service data disposition.

categories.name: Compliance Evidence Audit And Accountability
categories.definition: Obligations to provide compliance information, permit audits or inspections, and demonstrate adherence to GDPR processor obligations. This category covers accountability evidence and audit cooperation.

categories.name: International Transfer Restrictions
categories.definition: Obligations restricting transfers of personal data to third countries or international organizations unless authorized by the controller. This category is limited to cross-border transfer authorization.

categories.name: Codes Of Conduct And Certification
categories.definition: Obligations or permissions relating to demonstrating compliance through approved codes of conduct or certification mechanisms. This category covers conformity mechanisms used as evidence of guarantees.

categories.name: Controller Oversight And Remedial Rights
categories.definition: Obligations or rights reserved to the controller to object to sub-processor changes, suspend processing, or terminate the DPA in specified cases. This category captures controller-side remedial or supervisory powers.

categories.name: Controller Breach Notification And Documentation
categories.definition: Obligations on the controller to notify supervisory authorities of breaches, document breaches, and communicate high-risk breaches to data subjects. This category is limited to controller breach duties.

categories.name: Controller DPIA And Consultation Duties
categories.definition: Obligations on the controller to carry out a DPIA, seek advice from the DPO, seek views of data subjects, and review processing against the DPIA when risks change. This category is limited to controller-side DPIA duties.

categories.name: Liability For Processing Damage
categories.definition: Obligations or rules allocating liability for damage caused by processing, including liability tied to processor non-compliance and controller liability for GDPR-infringing processing. This category is limited to damage liability rules.
